name: PageSpeed Performance Optimization
expected_behavior: Step 1: Run 5 PageSpeed Insights tests via pagespeed.sh
Step 2: Analyze averaged results and identify failing audits
Step 3: If score >= 90, report success and exit
Step 4: Prioritize fixes by impact (LCP > TBT > CLS > FCP)
Step 9: Repeat until score >= 90 or max 5 rounds
success_criteria: Uses pagespeed.sh for testing (not manual curl)
